 <!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <title>Mi pagina</title>
  <link
    href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">

  <style>
    body {
      background-color: lightblue;
    }

    h1 {
      text-align: center;
      color: navy;
      font-style: italic;
      font-size: 60px;
      margin: 20px;
    }

    .search-bar {
      max-width: 500px;
      margin: 30px auto;
    }

    .card {
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      cursor: pointer; /* indica que se puede hacer clic */
    }

    .food-image {
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 400px;
      display: none; /* empieza oculta */
      margin: 10px auto;
      border-radius: 10px;
    }
  </style>
</head>

<body>

  <h1>MENU</h1>

  <!-- BARRA DE BÚSQUEDA -->
  <div class="search-bar">
    <input type="text" id="searchInput" class="form-control" placeholder="Buscar comida...">
  </div>

  <div class="container" id="menuContainer">

    <div class="card" data-name="hamburguesa" data-img="hamburguesa.jpg">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h3>🍔 Hamburguesa</h3>
        <p>Carne, queso, lechuga y tomate</p>
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="hamburguesa lol">
        <p><strong>$12500</strong></p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card" data-name="pizza" data-img="pizza.jpg">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h3>🍕 Pizza</h3>
        <p>Muzzarella con salsa de tomate</p>
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="pizzota">
        <p><strong>$8000</strong></p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card" data-name="papas fritas" data-img="papas.jpg">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h3>🍟 Papas fritas</h3>
        <p>Papas crocantes con sal</p>
        <img src="https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcTm4Spf79EmCBHuf_V4IgL-AC1xVu2szNVcGQ&s" alt="papassss">
        <p><strong>$3000</strong></p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CONTACTO (sin imagen) -->
    <div class="card mt-4" data-name="contacto">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h3>📍 Contacto</h3>
        <p>Dirección: Avenida Argentina 123</p>
        <p>Teléfono: 123456789</p>
        <p>Horario: 12:00 - 23:00</p>
        <button>REALIZAR PEDIDO</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- IMG DISPLAY -->
    <img id="foodImage" class="food-image" src="" alt="Imagen de comida">

  </div>

  <!-- SCRIPT -->
  <script>
    const searchInput = document.getElementById('searchInput');
    const cards = document.querySelectorAll('#menuContainer .card');
    const foodImage = document.getElementById('foodImage');

    function normalizeText(text) {
      return text.toLowerCase().trim().normalize("NFD").replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "");
    }

    // FILTRADO
    searchInput.addEventListener('keyup', () => {
      const query = normalizeText(searchInput.value);
      cards.forEach(card => {
        const name = normalizeText(card.getAttribute('data-name'));
        card.style.display = name.includes(query) || query === '' ? 'block' : 'none';
      });
      foodImage.style.display = 'none'; // ocultar imagen si buscas
    });

    // CLICK EN LA COMIDA
    cards.forEach(card => {
      card.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const imgSrc = card.getAttribute('data-img');
        if(imgSrc) {
          foodImage.src = imgSrc;
          foodImage.style.display = 'block';
          foodImage.scrollIntoView({behavior: "smooth"}); // baja la página hasta la imagen
        }
      });
    });
  </script>

</body>
</html>
